description: Gate 1 DoD tracker — all open decisions requiring Ken confirmation. Retrospective populated 2026-05-08 to capture all pre-today gaps. Checked at sprint planning and sprint review.

decisions.decision: Holocron at P4 FSI: Hybrid (Notion internal + self-hosted client KB) vs Notion-restrictions-only
decisions.recommended: Hybrid — Notion for AInchors internal, self-hosted KB for FSI client environments
decisions.kenDecision: HYBRID — Notion for AInchors internal, self-hosted KB for FSI client environments at P4.

decisions.decision: The Citadel build approach: Notion-based P2 / custom build P4 (recommended) vs direct custom build from P2
decisions.recommended: Notion-based v0 for first 2-3 SME clients Q3 2026, custom build Q3-Q4 for P4-ready version
decisions.urgency: P2 gate — before first client onboarded
decisions.kenDecision: NOTION-P2 — Notion-based Citadel v0 for first 2-3 SME clients at P2. Custom build at P4.

decisions.decision: Holonet P2 scope: REST/webhooks only (recommended) vs include DB connectors from P2
decisions.recommended: REST/webhooks only for P2. DB connectors = P3 commercial tier or P4.
decisions.urgency: P2 gate — before API build begins
decisions.kenDecision: REST-ONLY — Holonet P2 scope: REST/webhooks only. DB connectors deferred to P3/P4 commercial tier.

decisions.decision: Warden deployment model: AInchors-managed P2 (recommended) vs per-tenant Warden from P2
decisions.recommended: AInchors-managed single Warden for P2. Per-tenant Warden = P4 FSI only.
decisions.kenDecision: AINCHORS-MANAGED — Single Warden at P2. Per-tenant Warden deferred to P4 FSI only.

decisions.decision: Postgres deployment on OC1: standalone Homebrew vs Docker
decisions.recommended: Standalone Homebrew for P1/dev. Docker for P2 production.
decisions.urgency: Before any Postgres schema build begins
decisions.kenDecision: HOMEBREW — Postgres standalone Homebrew for P1/OC1. Revisit Docker at OC2 HA setup. Colima Tailscale incompatibility confirmed reason.

decisions.decision: Redis in P1: add now for P2-readiness vs defer to P2 and use Postgres session tables only
decisions.recommended: Defer Redis to P2. Use Postgres session tables for P1 short-term memory.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0104 / DRAFT-001 / T2 session memory build
decisions.urgency: Before T2 session memory build begins
decisions.kenDecision: DEFER — Redis deferred to P2. Postgres session tables for P1 short-term memory. No Redis overhead on OC1.

decisions.decision: Initial knowledge base ingestion priority — which documents to ingest first in Month 2
decisions.recommended: AInchors strategy docs, agent SOUL.md/RULES.md, Agile framework, EA docs. Then client-facing docs.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0104 / DRAFT-001 / T4 Semantic Memory build
decisions.urgency: Before T4 RAG pipeline build begins
decisions.kenDecision: APPROVED — Ingestion order: (1) Strategy docs, (2) Agent SOUL.md/RULES.md, (3) Governance docs, (4) EA/architecture docs (post-approval), (5) Client-facing docs at P2.

decisions.decision: PII scanner tool: spaCy (lighter, Python-native) vs Presidio (enterprise-grade, Microsoft)
decisions.recommended: Presidio — APRA CPG 234 requires enterprise-grade PII detection for P2+ client workloads
decisions.urgency: P2 gate — before client data ingestion
decisions.kenDecision: PRESIDIO — Enterprise-grade PII detection. APRA CPG 234 baseline for AU financial services clients at P2+. Build direction locked.

decisions.decision: Formal audit log retention policy for P1: set now (recommended: indefinite) vs defer
decisions.recommended: Set now: indefinite retention for P1. Review at P2 for regulated data retention schedules.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0104 / DRAFT-001 / TKT-0075 Audit Log Architecture
decisions.urgency: Before T3 episodic log build begins
decisions.kenDecision: APPROVED — Indefinite retention for P1. At P2: operational logs 90 days rolling, governance/decision logs 7 years (AU regulatory), client data audit trails per contract.

decisions.decision: agent_shared_state conflict handling: automatic retry on optimistic lock conflict vs last-write-wins with history preserved
decisions.recommended: Automatic retry (3x) on optimistic lock conflict. Last-write-wins only as final fallback with history entry.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0104 / DRAFT-001 / T5 Shared Memory build
decisions.urgency: Before T5 shared state build begins
decisions.kenDecision: AUTO-RETRY — Optimistic locking. First writer wins. Second writer retries up to 3x with 200ms delay. After 3 failures: log conflict + alert Yoda. No silent data loss.

decisions.decision: Portfolio artefacts primary audience: Ken job search (CIO/CTO credential) vs AInchors client-facing sales collateral
decisions.recommended: Both — dual-purpose. Ken job search framing for P1. Client-facing from P2.
decisions.kenDecision: DUAL — Ken first-person voice for P1 (job search credential + authentic brand). Repurpose as client evidence from P2 once real outcomes exist. EOD blogs continue current format.

decisions.decision: Lando BPM agent spec (Business_Process_Specialist_Agent_v1.md) — review against new Tier 3 governance model before formal acceptance
decisions.recommended: Review spec, add Tier 3 SOP and domain boundary section (per TKT-0105 Model3-Policy), then accept.
decisions.kenDecision: UPDATE-FIRST — Atlas to patch Business_Process_Specialist_Agent_v1.md: add Tier 3 SOP, domain boundary, cross-stream handoff protocol. TKT-0072 unblocks after spec is updated and approved.

decisions.decision: Warden monitoring scope: enrol specialist agents (Atlas, Thrawn, Lando, Mon Mothma, Spark) in model-policy.json OR document explicit exclusion permanently
decisions.recommended: Explicit exclusion documented in model-policy.json for Tier 3 agents (no model drift risk — they use Sonnet/Haiku by design). Krennic to be added when built.
decisions.kenDecision: EXPLICIT-EXCLUSION — Shield, Lex, Sage excluded from Warden monitoring by design. Document in model-policy.json. Ken directly oversees governance tier. TKT raised for human oversight process.

decisions.decision: Aria shared context files — verify context-for-aria.md, yoda-daily-brief.md, aria-daily-brief.md, relay-to-ken.json are present and active
decisions.recommended: Run verification check. If any missing, recreate. This is CHG-P6 from TKT-0103.
decisions.kenDecision: VERIFY-NOW. Results: context-for-aria.md MISSING (recreated), yoda-daily-brief.md OK (13.5h), aria-daily-brief.md STALE (132h — Aria to refresh). TKT raised for scheduled integrity checks + HIVE design consideration.

decisions.decision: Guardrail integration: R4/R5 (Aria NPS/pattern capture), C1-C5 (Ahsoka), A1-A4 (Atlas), G1-G2/W1-W2 (Sanctum/Warden) — all missing or unverified
decisions.recommended: Integrate R4/R5 into ARIA_RULES.md, verify/integrate C1-C5 into Ahsoka's rules, verify A1-A4 in Atlas SOUL.md, verify G1-G2/W1-W2. Track per TKT-0102.
decisions.urgency: Sprint 2 — strategy docs reference these as live but they are not
decisions.kenDecision: INTEGRATE-ALL — R4/R5 into ARIA_RULES.md, C1-C5 and A1-A4 into AHSOKA_RULES.md. Yoda to integrate now.

decisions.decision: main agent daily budget cap raised $80 → $150 for Sprint 3 monitoring period
decisions.recommended: $150 cap for Sprint 3. Review at sprint end. Revert to $80 if average daily spend <$100, keep at $150 if consistently above.
decisions.blockedItem: None — change already applied. Confirmation locks the monitoring criteria.
decisions.urgency: Low — active now, review at Sprint 3 close
decisions.reviewCriteria: At Sprint 3 end: if avg daily main spend <$100 → revert to $80. If $100-$150 → keep $150. If >$150 → escalate and discuss.
decisions.kenDecision: CONFIRMED — $150 daily cap locked for Sprint 3. Review at sprint end 2026-05-18. Revert to $80 if avg daily spend < $100 post-sprint.

decisions.decision: CLI-Anything adoption decision — yes / no / conditional for AInchors P2-P4
decisions.recommended: Pending Atlas assessment (state/atlas-cli-anything-assessment.md). Atlas fires today.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0141 — strategic opportunity angle. No build starts until Ken confirms.
decisions.urgency: Low — strategic decision, no P2 gate dependency
decisions.reviewNote: Read Atlas assessment summary (Telegram delivery) + state/atlas-cli-anything-assessment.md. Confirm: adopt / reject / conditional with gates.
decisions.kenDecision: DEFER — wait for Atlas EA assessment (TKT-0143) before adopting, rejecting, or conditionalising CLI-Anything. No action on TKT-0141 strategic angle until assessment lands.

decisions.decision: xurl bundled skill BLOCK verdict — accept as documented false positive or quarantine?
decisions.recommended: Accept as false positive — the curl|bash pattern is in an install example, not an agent-executable directive. Already logged in skill-registry.json as 'clean-5-low-fp'.
decisions.blockedItem: None — xurl is a bundled OpenClaw skill, already in use.
decisions.reviewNote: Confirm: accept the xurl false positive verdict, or restrict xurl from being loaded in agent sessions.
decisions.kenDecision: ACCEPTED as documented false positive. xurl remains in use. curl|bash pattern is in install example comment only — not executable. Add to audit-skill.sh whitelist.

decisions.decision: Evaluate Cisco open-source Skill Scanner + Snyk mcp-scan as additional controls — add to intake SOP or skip?
decisions.recommended: Evaluate both tools. Cisco skill scanner is open-source and directly addresses SKILL.md poisoning. Snyk mcp-scan is MCP-focused. Suggest: pilot Cisco scanner as a mandatory step 3b in the intake SOP.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0141 — tooling controls. Requires Ken go-ahead before evaluating.
decisions.urgency: Low — nice-to-have hardening, no P2 gate
decisions.reviewNote: Confirm: pilot Cisco skill scanner as additional SOP step, or skip and rely on audit-skill.sh + manual read only.
decisions.kenDecision: CISCO-NOW + SNYK-DEFER — Pilot Cisco Skill Scanner now as SOP step 3b in skill installation. Snyk mcp-scan deferred to P2 when MCP integrations grow. Forge to integrate Cisco scanner into audit-skill.sh workflow.
